DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT FOOD 4 LESS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO EXECUTE AN AUTHORIZATION FOR THE RELEASE OF HER MEDICAL RECORD FROM ST. LUKE'S HOSPITAL IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF LACORA SMOOT SHALL PROVIDE AN EXECUTED AUTHORIZATION FOR THE RELEASE OF HER MEDICAL AND BILLING RECORDS FROM ST. LUKE'S HOSPITAL TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WITHIN TEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN, NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by either party. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to 9/04/2012. The OSC is re-set to 10/09/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Ptlf To Execute An Authorization For The Release Of Her Medical Record
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Theodore F. Aldrich, Esq. of Brady, Vorwerck, Ryder & Caspino, Tel. 925.274.9500, appearing for defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FOOD 4 LESS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Execute An Authorization For The Release Of Her Medical Record from St. Luke's Hospital is GRANTED IN PART. Plaintiff Lacora Smoot shall provide an executed authorization for the release of her medical and billing records from St. Luke's Hospital to counsel for defendant within ten days of the date of this order. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported.
